prompt: A formal Japanese-style passport or ID photo of a young adult woman, chest-up and centered, facing straight toward the camera with a neutral professional expression, on a clean light gray studio background. She has straight dark brown to near-black hair, smooth and glossy, parted slightly off-center near the top, with the hair falling evenly past the shoulders on both sides. Her ears are partially visible, with no noticeable accessories. She wears a tailored black business blazer over a plain white crew-neck blouse, creating a conservative job-application or official-document look. The lighting is soft, even, and frontal with minimal shadows, high sharpness, natural skin tones, and a realistic photographic finish. Composition is symmetrical and tightly cropped like an ID photo, showing the top of the head, shoulders, neckline, and upper chest. No smile, no dramatic styling, no props, no text, no border, no background details.
